title: daphne furcata
intro: Daphne furcata, also known as furcated spurge, is a type of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Daphne furcata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Daphne furcata can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
